# SaveOff

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
floppy disk, unsalvageable

## Categories
text, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/save-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SaveOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SaveOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
